response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java proficiency for this junior role, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level titles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about role fit and team integration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Demonstrated agile practices and DevOps infrastructure experience
concerns: Only basic German proficiency — fails critical language requirement
Overqualified with senior titles, contradicting entry-level role expectations
Java experience is minimal and not highlighted as a primary skill
